main.description: Returns bookable slots for an actor within a bounded time range.

actor.description: DID or handle of the actor whose availability is requested.

start.description: Inclusive start of the requested range.

end.description: Exclusive end of the requested range.

durationMinutes.description: Requested slot duration. The server default is used when omitted.

generatedAt.description: Time at which the availability result was calculated.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: The requested range or duration is invalid.

errors.name: CalendarUnavailable
errors.description: The actor's calendar connection is temporarily unavailable.

availabilitySlot.description: A half-open time range that may be submitted to com.schedj.book.

start.description: Inclusive start of the available slot.

end.description: Exclusive end of the available slot.
